name: Soreheim Alliance
summary: Giant-led alliance ruled from Soreheim Proper, where central quota authority, industrial hierarchy, and regional mediation hold together a large multi-population state.

governance_model.central_core: Soreheim Proper and the Giant Council govern alliance law, diplomacy, quotas, foreign affairs, and strategic production.
domestic_layers: regional leaders acting under Storm Giant or Decon-aligned mandate
industrial clans and syndicates managing production, routes, and technical labor
patron-families and clan-households mediating domestic disputes, crew loyalty, and local obligation

bounded_population_signals: field-level support classification preserved in demography layer
runtime packets must not contradict canonical roster
population_status.notes: The roster is treated as explicit nation-level canon because the source set already strongly supports giant and broad mortal population enumeration.

cultural_posture: Contribution, ambition, industrial discipline, and communal obligation define everyday social value.
legal_posture: Law is hierarchical, quota-conscious, and restorative in some domains but severe toward sabotage, disloyalty, and illicit magic.
magic_posture: Magic is rare, controlled, and strategically integrated under elite oversight rather than socially free.
religious_posture: State religion reinforces ambition, domination, contemplation, and communal purpose through integrated ceremonial life.
economic_posture: The Eternal Lands, Unternal Lands, and Soreheim Proper form an interdependent extraction-production-refinement economy.
military_security_posture: Heavy patrol, industrial defense, command hierarchy, and giant enforcement keep internal order and protect key infrastructure.
mobility_settlement_posture: A mix of monumental fixed centers, industrial spans, frontier settlements, and quota-linked transport corridors define movement.
major_settlements_or_operating_nodes: major industrial spans and agricultural hubs

known_absences: full settlement-by-settlement demographic breakdown is not exhaustively enumerated here

unresolved_identity_gaps: Some local population balances remain sub-polity rather than fully quantified at settlement resolution.
canon_note: See corresponding demography record for support classification and contradiction-safe reconciliation trail.
